Here is the list of signs and their corresponding scores:
1. Aries - 7/10 - Natural-born leaders, but can be impulsive and reckless.
2. Taurus - 8.5/10 - Practical and reliable, but can be stubborn and materialistic.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, but can be flighty and irresponsible.
4. Cancer - 7.5/10 - Emotional and nurturing, but can be moody and clingy.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, but can be arrogant and attention-seeking.
6. Virgo - 9.5/10 - Analytical and hardworking, but can be perfectionistic and critical.
7. Libra - 8.5/10 - Diplomatic and social, but can be indecisive and overly concerned with appearances.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, but can be secretive and controlling.
9. Sagittarius - 9/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but can be reckless and blunt.
10. Capricorn - 8.5/10 - Disciplined and responsible, but can be rigid and serious.
11. Aquarius - 9.5/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but can be unconventional and aloof.
12. Pisces - 8/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, but can be dreamy and unrealistic.
Note: The scores are subjective and based on general astrological characteristics associated with each sign.
